mnemonics.title: Stars & Bars Formula
mnemonics.content: For n bins and r items: Imagine placing r stars (items) and (n-1) bars (dividers) → Total positions = C(r+n-1, r)

acronyms.usage: Remember formula C(n+r-1, r) for selecting r items from n types with repetition

visualTips.visualization: Imagine scrambling colored balls - same color balls swapping doesn't create new arrangement

analogies.analogy: Like distributing identical cookies to children - count how many ways using Stars & Bars
